'''dhadhaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pseudoallelism|pseudoallelism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-dh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pseudoallelism|pseudoallelism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhadhaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhædhæzæth|dhædhæzæth]] || [[word:dhædhæzæj|dhædhæzæj]] || [[word:dhædhæzæsh|dhædhæzæsh]] || [[word:dhædhæzæ|dhædhæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhadhadhazath|dhadhadhazath]] || [[word:dhadhadhazaj|dhadhadhazaj]] || [[word:dhadhadhazash|dhadhadhazash]] || [[word:dhadhadhaza|dhadhadhaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhadhazath|dhadhazath]] || [[word:dhadhazaj|dhadhazaj]] || [[word:dhadhazash|dhadhazash]] || [[word:dhadhaza|dhadhaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhadhafzafth|dhadhafzafth]] || [[word:dhadhafzafj|dhadhafzafj]] || [[word:dhadhafzafsh|dhadhafzafsh]] || [[word:dhadhafzaf|dhadhafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhadhazatha|dhadhazatha]] || [[word:dhadhazaja|dhadhazaja]] || [[word:dhadhazasha|dhadhazasha]] || [[word:dhadhazaka|dhadhazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhadhazath|dhadhazath]] || [[word:dhadhazaj|dhadhazaj]] || [[word:dhadhazash|dhadhazash]] || [[word:dhadhaza|dhadhaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhadhazathal|dhadhazathal]] || [[word:dhadhazajal|dhadhazajal]] || [[word:dhadhazashal|dhadhazashal]] || [[word:dhadhazakal|dhadhazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhadhazaathatha|dhadhazaathatha]] || [[word:dhadhazaajaja|dhadhazaajaja]] || [[word:dhadhazaashasha|dhadhazaashasha]] || [[word:dhadhazaaka|dhadhazaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhadhazathan|dhadhazathan]] || [[word:dhadhazajan|dhadhazajan]] || [[word:dhadhazashan|dhadhazashan]] || [[word:dhadhazakan|dhadhazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhadhazathaoro|dhadhazathaoro]] || [[word:dhadhazajaoro|dhadhazajaoro]] || [[word:dhadhazashaoro|dhadhazashaoro]] || [[word:dhadhazakaoro|dhadhazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
